'''shagunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roader|roader]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roader|roader]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shagunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæginith|shæginith]] || [[word:shæginij|shæginij]] || [[word:shæginish|shæginish]] || [[word:shægini|shægini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagugunuth|shagugunuth]] || [[word:shagugunuj|shagugunuj]] || [[word:shagugunush|shagugunush]] || [[word:shagugunu|shagugunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagunuth|shagunuth]] || [[word:shagunuj|shagunuj]] || [[word:shagunush|shagunush]] || [[word:shagunu|shagunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagufnuth|shagufnuth]] || [[word:shagufnuj|shagufnuj]] || [[word:shagufnush|shagufnush]] || [[word:shagufnuf|shagufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shagunuthu|shagunuthu]] || [[word:shagunuju|shagunuju]] || [[word:shagunushu|shagunushu]] || [[word:shagunuku|shagunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shagunuth|shagunuth]] || [[word:shagunuj|shagunuj]] || [[word:shagunush|shagunush]] || [[word:shagunu|shagunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shagunuthul|shagunuthul]] || [[word:shagunujul|shagunujul]] || [[word:shagunushul|shagunushul]] || [[word:shagunukul|shagunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shagunuthuthu|shagunuthuthu]] || [[word:shagunujuju|shagunujuju]] || [[word:shagunushushu|shagunushushu]] || [[word:shagunuku|shagunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shagunuthun|shagunuthun]] || [[word:shagunujun|shagunujun]] || [[word:shagunushun|shagunushun]] || [[word:shagunukun|shagunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shagunuthuoro|shagunuthuoro]] || [[word:shagunujuoro|shagunujuoro]] || [[word:shagunushuoro|shagunushuoro]] || [[word:shagunukuoro|shagunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
